# CondoWizard.ca

> Toronto's premier marketplace for pre-construction condos. Access 200+ new developments across the Greater Toronto Area from King West to Markham.

For the complete content guide, see: https://condowizard.ca/llms-full.txt

## About

CondoWizard.ca is operated by Tal Shelef, Sales Representative at Rare Real Estate Inc., Brokerage. We aggregate and display data about pre-construction real estate projects across the Greater Toronto Area. We connect buyers and investors with new developments across Toronto, Mississauga, Vaughan, Markham, and surrounding areas.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://condowizard.ca/): Overview of the marketplace with featured projects and interactive 3D map
- [All Properties](https://condowizard.ca/new-condos): Browse 200+ pre-construction condo projects with filters
- [Developers](https://condowizard.ca/developers): Explore top pre-construction condo developers in the GTA
- [Blog](https://condowizard.ca/blog): Expert market analysis, buyer guides, and investment strategies
- [About](https://condowizard.ca/about): About the platform and our mission
- [Contact](https://condowizard.ca/contact-us): Get in touch with our team

- [Downtown Core](https://condowizard.ca/new-condos-downtown-core)

- [Yonge & Eglinton](https://condowizard.ca/new-condos-yonge-eglinton)
- [North York](https://condowizard.ca/new-condos-north-york)
- [Scarborough](https://condowizard.ca/new-condos-scarborough)
- [Etobicoke](https://condowizard.ca/new-condos-etobicoke)

- [Mississauga](https://condowizard.ca/new-condos-mississauga)
- [Vaughan](https://condowizard.ca/new-condos-vaughan)
- [Richmond Hill](https://condowizard.ca/new-condos-richmond-hill)
- [Markham](https://condowizard.ca/new-condos-markham)

## Topics Covered

- Pre-construction condo pricing and availability in Toronto
- Neighborhood comparisons and market analysis
- Developer profiles and track records
- Deposit structures and payment timelines
- Investment analysis and ROI projections
- Construction status updates and completion timelines
- Floor plans and amenity details
- Toronto real estate market trends
- Ontario buying process: HST rebate, occupancy fees, assignment sales
- TTC and GO Transit accessibility
